headline: HONEYWELL ANNOUNCES QUANTINUUM'S FILING OF REGISTRATION STATEMENT FOR PROPOSED INITIAL PUBLIC OFFERING
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced that Quantinuum, a leading, full-stack quantum computing company, has publicly filed a registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (the "SEC") relating to a proposed initial public offering of shares of its Class A common stock.
